articles.title: Karnataka to introduce STEAM education in Government schools, Robotics and Coding to become part of learning
articles.summary: Karnataka will introduce STEAM-based education in government schools, adding robotics and coding to classroom learning to strengthen students' problem-solving and critical thinking skills. The initiative aims to prepare students for future careers through practical learning while narrowing the technology education gap between government and private schools with a stronger focus on skill-based education..

articles.summary: CBSE is expected to declare the Class 10 Second Board Result 2026 soon for over 6.68 lakh students who appeared under the new two-exam system. Candidates will be able to access their scorecards through the official websites and alternative platforms such as DigiLocker and UMANG, while carefully verifying the details mentioned on their provisional marksheets..

articles.title: AP EAMCET result 2026 expected to be released soon at cets.apsche.ap.gov.in: Check steps to download scorecards here
articles.summary: The AP EAMCET 2026 result is expected to be announced shortly, ending the wait for engineering, agriculture and pharmacy aspirants across Andhra Pradesh. Candidates will be able to download their rank cards online before the counselling process begins, which will include registration, document verification, choice filling and seat allotment for undergraduate admissions..
